arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Liverpool star and Man Utd target as Saliba alternatives
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s number one defensive transfer target this summer is expected to be William Saliba but the La Liga giants have drawn up plans for three Premier League-based alternatives if the Arsenal man is unavailable. Centre-backs are likely to be the main focus for Real, with Saliba having previously been described as the club’s ‘highest priority’, although Arsenal will not be welcome sellers for their star defender.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford admission speaks volumes as Man Utd star decides on new direction
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has looked sharp in his first two performances for Aston Villa, but the Manchester United loanee could have ended up at a different club

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe 'has a spy' among Man Utd staff amid 'growing culture of fear' at club
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe owns a 28.94 per cent stake in Manchester United and his brutal cost-cutting strategy has made him an unpopular figure both inside and outside of Old Trafford

arts.ttl: I saw how the stress of managing Everton impacted Frank Lampard - Sean Dyche left players shocked
arts.sum: Andy Lonergan has opened up on life at Everton under Frank Lampard and Sean Dyche

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'set their sights' on 30-year-old goalkeeper as possible Andre Onana replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly interested in signing experienced goalkeeper Juan Musso, who is currently on loan at Atletico Madrid from Atalanta BC.

arts.ttl: Man Utd dealt new hammer blow as extent of Kobbie Mainoo injury emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United were without a glut of players for their 1-0 defeat by Tottenham and have received more bad news about midfielder Kobbie Mainoo, who has a calf injury

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford causes disagreement as ex-Man Utd team-mates had different first impression
arts.sum: Two of Marcus Rashford's former Manchester United academy team-mates have offered contrasting views on how good the loanee Aston Villa forward was as a youngster

arts.ttl: Arne Slot accepts FA charge after Liverpool boss was sent off in chaos following Merseyside derby - with punishment still to be decided
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Slot and his assistant were sent off for protestations towards referee Michael Oliver as the angry pair charged on to the pitch following the 2-2 draw, in which Everton scored a late equaliser.

arts.ttl: Everton plot move to poach Leeds CEO Angus Kinnear
arts.sum: Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear is reportedly become an appointment target for Everton’s new owners The Friedkin Group. It is claimed that Leeds CEO Angus Kinnear is wanted at Goodison Park as they prepare for a new era at their Bramley Moore Dock arena.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim fans' verdict makes next Manchester United move clear for Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Ineos have reached a year in charge at Man Utd and the Manchester Evening News has canvassed supporter opinion on how the first 12 months have gone.
